summary: The diff implements all four requirements. REQ-1 is addressed in HeroSection.tsx with inline-block spans and nbsp for spaces. REQ-2 is addressed via the new TributeLettersSection.tsx with scroll-triggered animations and integration into App.tsx. REQ-3 reuses TributeAnimations.tsx components as ambient backgrounds per friend. REQ-4 is addressed in friendsData.ts with full tribute content. However, the diff is truncated, so exact text content matching and complete animation implementation cannot be fully verified.
